message:
🐛 Fix Playwright login tests failing on mobile-safari (#11050)

Replace route.fulfill({ status: 302 }) with a 200 + client-side
redirect (location.replace) because Playwright does not support
fulfilling routes with 3xx redirect status codes on WebKit.

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
